title: Opening for Medical Officer at Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
